summary: Bug fix verified: Lead creation form now correctly handles region validation. Previously, admin users with territory 'All India' were having leads fail to save because the form was using 'All India' as region (invalid). The fix ensures only valid regions (North India, South India, West India, East India) are pre-populated.

minor.issue: Backend accepts empty string for region field. Frontend validation blocks this but backend should also validate.

passed_tests: Add Lead form loads without errors
Region field NOT pre-populated for users with 'All India' territory (bug fix verified)
Region field shows valid options: North India, South India, West India, East India
Form validation blocks submission when region is not selected
Form validation blocks submission when state is not selected
Form validation blocks submission when city is not selected
Lead creation with all required fields (company, region, state, city) succeeds
Created lead appears in leads list with correct Lead ID format
Success toast shown after lead creation
Navigation back to leads list after successful creation
Backend API: Create lead with valid region returns 200
Backend API: Create lead without region returns 422 (validation error)
Backend API: All 4 valid regions work (North India, South India, West India, East India)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend could add explicit validation to reject empty region strings - currently accepts empty string but frontend blocks this

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - 1 expected failure for empty region edge case)

seed_data_creation: Created test leads prefixed with 'TEST' for validation testing - these were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead creation bug fix has been verified. The getInitialRegion() function in AddEditLead.js now only uses user.territory if it matches one of the valid regions. Frontend validation blocks submission when required fields are missing. Backend accepts empty region but frontend prevents this.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The AddEditLead.js form was initializing the region field with user.territory directly without validating if it was a valid region value. Admin users with territory 'All India' would have their leads fail because 'All India' is not a valid region.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added getInitialRegion() function that validates user.territory against valid regions ['North India', 'South India', 'West India', 'East India'] before using it. If territory doesn't match, returns empty string requiring manual selection.
rca_of_the_issue.additional_validation: Added required field validation at lines 204-217 that checks company, region, state, city before submission with clear toast error messages.
